pokemon:naganadel.name: Naganadel
pokemon:naganadel.summary: One kind of Ultra Beast, it fires a glowing, venomous liquid from its needles. This liquid is also immensely adhesive.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: One kind of Ultra Beast, it fires a glowing, venomous liquid from its needles. This liquid is also immensely adhesive.
It stores hundreds of liters of poisonous liquid inside its body. It is one of the organisms known as UBs.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: One kind of Ultra Beast, it fires a glowing, venomous liquid from its needles. This liquid is also immensely adhesive.

pokemon:poipole.name: Poipole
pokemon:poipole.summary: An Ultra Beast that lives in a different world, it cackles wildly as it sprays its opponents with poison from the needles on its head.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: An Ultra Beast that lives in a different world, it cackles wildly as it sprays its opponents with poison from the needles on its head.
This Ultra Beast is well enough liked to be chosen as a first partner in its own world.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: An Ultra Beast that lives in a different world, it cackles wildly as it sprays its opponents with poison from the needles on its head.
